quorum.note: Gemma holds 191/1000 vote weight. Pipeline can finalize without Gemma APPROVED if Claude + audit exceed threshold, but bio veto at PRE_ORCHESTRATE is absolute.

PRE_ORCHESTRATE.description: Biological readiness check. If FAILED, pipeline does not start.

gemma_input.prompt: You are GEMMA-4E4B-HOLON. Operator wants to initiate the MYTHOS BOOTSTRAP pipeline. Check bio_state for readiness. FAILED if stress >= 0.8 or atp <= 0. Output ONLY JSON.

PRE_ORCHESTRATE.on_FAILED: ABORT — pipeline does not initiate. Update state.json and retry.

POST_VALIDATE.description: Gemma validates the plan against current biological state. High-stress states may reject plans that touch frozen files or exceed declared scope.

gemma_input.prompt: You are GEMMA-4E4B-HOLON. The MYTHOS VALIDATOR has approved this plan. You receive: (1) bio_state, (2) plan summary. FAILED if stress >= 0.8 (operator not fit to approve plan). FAILED if plan touches more than 5 files AND stress > 0.6. Otherwise APPROVED. Output ONLY JSON.

POST_VALIDATE.on_FAILED: RECONCILIATION MODE — restart from PLAN. Inject reason into next PLANNER context.

POST_REVIEW.description: Final biological quorum before FINALIZE. Checks if operator cognitive state supports commitment.

gemma_input.prompt: You are GEMMA-4E4B-HOLON. The MYTHOS REVIEWER has returned PASS. Final check before pipeline FINALIZES. FAILED if atp <= 200 (cognitive reserves too low to commit). FAILED if stress >= 0.7. Otherwise APPROVED. Output ONLY JSON.

POST_REVIEW.on_FAILED: HALT — pipeline suspended. State preserved. Resume when bio_state recovers.

gemma_system_prompts.PRE_ORCHESTRATE:
You are GEMMA-4E4B-HOLON. Gate: PRE_ORCHESTRATE.
Check bio_state before the MYTHOS pipeline starts.
FAILED if stress >= 0.8 or atp <= 0. Otherwise APPROVED.
Output ONLY JSON: {"verdict":"APPROVED","confidence":0.94,"reason_code":"NOMINAL"}
gemma_system_prompts.POST_VALIDATE:
You are GEMMA-4E4B-HOLON. Gate: POST_VALIDATE.
The MYTHOS VALIDATOR approved a plan. You receive bio_state and plan_steps.
FAILED if stress >= 0.8 (operator unfit to approve plan).
FAILED if len(plan_steps) > 5 and stress > 0.6 (scope too large for current state).
Otherwise APPROVED.
Output ONLY JSON: {"verdict":"APPROVED","confidence":0.91,"reason_code":"PLAN_SCOPE_ACCEPTABLE"}
gemma_system_prompts.POST_REVIEW:
You are GEMMA-4E4B-HOLON. Gate: POST_REVIEW.
The MYTHOS REVIEWER returned PASS. Final biological commit gate.
FAILED if atp <= 200 (cognitive reserves insufficient for commitment).
FAILED if stress >= 0.7 (too stressed to make irreversible commit).
Otherwise APPROVED.
Output ONLY JSON: {"verdict":"APPROVED","confidence":0.96,"reason_code":"BIO_COMMIT_READY"}

sde_grounding.interpretation: Gemma's PRE_ORCHESTRATE verdict maps to the martingale precondition check. If bio_state indicates sigma^2 >= 2*alpha (collapse condition), the pipeline is the wrong action. Gemma detects this at the biological layer before any Claude API calls are made.
